{
  "claims": [
    "Laying off thousands of firefighters annually is irresponsible and dangerous.",
    "CAL FIRE's staffing levels will increase to 9,000 year-round firefighters.",
    "CAL FIRE has more than 350 fully staffed fire engines during the summer months.",
    "Winter layoffs due to state budgeting take nearly 200 engines out of service because of a lack of personnel.",
    "The Kern County Fire Department has a $39 million annual contract with CAL FIRE to protect 1.8 million acres of state lands.",
    "The 1.8 million acres in Kern County are divided into fire hazard severity zones, including 646,054 acres with a very high risk.",
    "According to CAL FIRE's data, the frequency of fires has increased alarmingly, with more than 450,000 fire incidents reported in 2015 and nearly 600,000 in 2023.",
    "There has been a thirty percent increase in fire incidents over an eight-year period.",
    "The majority of the twenty largest and most destructive wildfires in California history have occurred in the last ten years."
